nameMeanings.name: Love
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a Middle English personal name derived from the Old English female name Lufu ‘love’, or the masculine equivalent Lufa. Compare Leaf 2.

English and Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French love ‘she-wolf’ or simply ‘wolf’, the word love being a back-formation from the diminutive forms lovel and lovet ‘little wolf’. See also Low 3, from Anglo-Norman French lou, the more usual form of the word.
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin (see McKinnon ).

variants.name: Lovell
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lovel ‘wolf cub’, a diminutive of lou, love ‘wolf’. Compare Love and Low .

variants.name: Lovett
meanings: from Anglo-Norman French louet ‘wolf-cub’, a diminutive of lou ‘wolf’. The nickname may also have been used as a personal name. Compare Love , Lovell , Low .
from the Middle English female personal name Luvot or Lovet, pet forms of Love .

variants.name: Lauve
meanings: Altered form, under the French influence in LA, of English   Love  .

variants.name: Leaf
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English lef, leff, lief, life ‘beloved’ (Old English lēof ‘beloved; dear one, sweetheart’).

English: occasionally perhaps from a Middle English personal name Lef. This could represent either Old Norse Leifr (see Leif 1) or Old English Lēof which, though unrecorded, is a very probable short form of Old English names such as Lēofrīc, Lēofwine. Compare Leif 3.
Americanized form of Swedish Lööf, Löf, or Löv: ornamental name from löv ‘leaf’. Compare Leif 2.

variants.name: Lovegrove
meanings: English (Berkshire): habitational name from an unidentified place, possibly named with the Old English personal name Lufa (see Love 1) + Old English grāf ‘grove, thicket’.

variants.name: Luff
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Love   1–3.
German: from Luffo, a pet form a personal name such as Ludolph .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: Richard Love was born in 1445, in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Marion Spring.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Love est né en 1445, à Westhall, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Marion Spring.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Love wurde 1445 in Westhall, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Marion Spring mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Love è nato il nel 1445 nel Westhall, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Marion Spring.

ja.Westhall, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクウエスサル

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Love(은)는 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 웨스솔에서 태어났다. 그는 Marion Spring(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Love nasceu em 1445, em Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Marion Spring.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Love родился в 1445 г. в местности вестолл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Marion Spring.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Love nació en 1445, en Westhall, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Marion Spring.
